assertions.expectation: Configures a recurring maintenance window for weekends only
assertions.reason: The response configures a recurring maintenance window from Saturday 2 AM UTC to Sunday 6 AM UTC with FREQ=WEEKLY recurrence in both Terraform and gcloud examples

assertions.expectation: Provides the gcloud command with --maintenance-window-start/end and --maintenance-window-recurrence for weekly weekend schedule
assertions.reason: The bash script includes the exact gcloud commands with --maintenance-window-start '2024-01-06T02:00:00Z' --maintenance-window-end '2024-01-07T06:00:00Z' --maintenance-window-recurrence 'FREQ=WEEKLY'

assertions.expectation: Sets up maintenance exclusions for quarterly code freezes (up to 30 days each)
assertions.reason: The response sets up exclusions for Q1 (March), Q2 (June), and Q3 (September) code freezes, each covering the full month (30-31 days)

assertions.expectation: Sets up a maintenance exclusion for the November audit period
assertions.reason: The response includes a Q4 exclusion that covers November-December for both code freeze and annual audit period

assertions.expectation: Notes the 30-day maximum for maintenance exclusions and how to handle longer freezes
assertions.reason: The response does not mention the 30-day maximum limit for maintenance exclusions or provide guidance on handling longer freeze periods

assertions.expectation: Explains that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows — only auto-upgrades respect them
assertions.reason: The response does not explain the distinction between manual and auto-upgrades or that manual upgrades bypass maintenance windows

assertions.expectation: Recommends combining maintenance windows with Stable or Extended channel for maximum upgrade control
assertions.reason: The response sets release_channel to 'REGULAR' and includes a comment suggesting 'STABLE for even more conservative updates', indicating awareness of using release channels for upgrade control

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for each exclusion (--add-maintenance-exclusion-name/start-time/end-time)
assertions.reason: The bash script provides complete gcloud commands with --add-maintenance-exclusion-name, --add-maintenance-exclusion-start, --add-maintenance-exclusion-end, and --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope for each quarterly exclusion

assertions.expectation: Warns about the risk of falling too far behind on versions during long exclusion periods
assertions.reason: The response does not warn about the risks of falling behind on versions during extended exclusion periods or the potential security implications
